headline: ePlus Launches Private AI Infrastructure Managed Service
summary: ePlus inc. (NASDAQ NGS: PLUS – news) today announced that it has launched Private AI Infrastructure Managed Service, a pre-validated, and production-ready AI foundation that takes enterprises from initial assessment through global-scale deployment.

headline: ORCA Computing Expands Commercial Quantum Presence Through Digital Realty Innovation Lab in London
summary: LONDON & AUSTIN, Texas, May 26, 2026--ORCA Computing a leading quantum computing company, announced today its participation in the newly launched Digital Realty Innovation Lab (DRIL) in London, a next-generation infrastructure testing environment developed by Digital Realty, the world’s largest cloud-and carrier-neutral data center provider.
